title: IterationEvaluatorOutput
description: Structured output from the iteration_evaluator agent.

best_iteration_id.description: The ID of the best available code iteration to move forward with.

iteration_id_to_modify.description: The iteration that the planner should build on. Either 'latest' or a specific iteration ID.

previous_iteration_count.description: How many previous iterations the planner should load for context. Typically a small integer.

reason_for_best_iteration_id.description: A detailed justification explaining why this iteration was selected as the best.

reason_for_iteration_id_to_modify.description: A detailed justification explaining why this iteration was chosen as the one to modify next.

multi_iteration_trend_summary.description: A concise summary of patterns observed across multiple iterations, including what kinds of changes have helped or hindered progress.

multi_iteration_trend_analysis.description: Structured list of trend observations and their assessed confidence and outcomes.

strategic_guidance.description: Optional structured recommendations based on multi-iteration trend analysis.

status_report.description: Standup-style summary of what the system currently does, what is partially working, and what is not yet functioning, based on logs from this iteration.
